# opnsense_quagga_ospf6_routemap (Resource)

Manages an OSPFv3 route map on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) Action: permit or deny.
- `name` (String) Route map name.
- `route_map_id` (Number) Order/ID.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this route map is enabled.
- `set` (String) Set clause.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
